issue_title: Bug with the bulk selection column with freeze columns
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
Bulk selection checkboxes option column is not fixed and it causes issues when horizontal scrolling with freezed columns. See video for explanation.

**To Reproduce**
See the recording
https://github.com/rowyio/rowy/assets/307298/7f6fda8a-9081-4a4d-88ae-01877d55bfbc

**Ex
test_description_zh: 在表格中启用批量选择列（复选框列）和冻结列功能，然后进行水平滚动，观察批量选择复选框列在水平滚动时的表现。
expected_result_zh: 批量选择复选框列应始终固定在左侧，水平滚动时不会随其他列一起移动，且不会与冻结列产生重叠或错位问题。
